---
title: "get_exercises"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{gget_exercises}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---


```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)

```

This page provides an overview for the `get_exercises()` function, highlighting some of its potential uses. This is the latest addition to the `troopdata` package.
